skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: In the given equation, a is a positive constant. The equation has two integer solutions, both positive. What is one possible value of a?
rationale: For x2 − ax + 18 = 0 with integer roots p and q, we need pq = 18 and p + q = a. Positive integer pairs (p,q) with product 18: (1,18), (2,9), (3,6). Sums: 19, 11, 9. So a can be 9, 11, or 19.
